Part.Source: Event Start &FiltroImpCstIpi = &AuxImpCstIpi /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid1.Rows = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] -
